name: The Leaden Wing
specialty: Specializing in covert infiltration and tactical sabotage, The Leaden Wing's reputation for subtle and efficient elimination of threats sets them apart from other Iron Fang Consortium teams.

members.name: Arin Half-Elven
members.note: A stern and unflinching leader, he bears a scar down his left cheek from a past confrontation with a rogue warlord.

members.name: Korin Ironfist
members.note: Known for his imposing size and temper, Korin hides a tender heart beneath his gruff exterior.

members.name: Vex Bronzeclaw
members.note: With her silver eyes and eloquent tongue, Vex navigates the treacherous web of Undercity politics with ease, but her past with the Argent Blades still haunts her.

visual: Dressed in black leather and steel, The Leaden Wing moves through the Undercity like a shadow. Their armor bears the insignia of the Iron Fang Consortium, a wing made of lead. They carry themselves with a quiet confidence, always ready for action.
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity claim that The Leaden Wing's methods are both brutal and effective, earning them both fear and respect.
